name: Flame Strike
description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-­‐‑foot-­‐‑radius, 40-­‐‑foot-­‐‑high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes fire damage equal to 4d6 and radiant damage equal to 4d6, or half as much total damage on a successful one. At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the fire damage or the radiant damage (your choice) increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th. Flaming Sphere 2nd-­‐‑level conjuration
